title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Groww

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Groww
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Groww in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Groww:
Groww is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
